name: Minor Reveal
description: A small pulse that briefly exposes hidden knowledge.

name: Major Reveal
description: A stronger scan that exposes a wider set of clues.

name: Cosmic Reveal
description: A burst of insight that lights up the entire board.

name: Freeze
description: Locks the enemy's momentum for a short window.
effect: Pause enemy AP gain for 6 seconds.

name: Obsidian Shield
description: A hardened barrier that dulls the next strike.
effect: Negate 50% of the next enemy attack.

name: Holyxaliber
description: A blessed blade that heightens your offense.

name: Bandage
description: Quick field treatment for minor wounds.

name: Holy Heal
description: Sacred restoration that mends severe damage.
